findings.description: Knowledge file states 'デフォルトは `*`' as an explicit default value, but the source never states this in prose. The source only shows '*' inside an HTML code comment ('*'に置換して出力する). The source does not explicitly declare '*' as the default replacement character.
findings.source_evidence: Source comment: `<%-- '*'に置換して出力する。置換文字は変更可能。 --%>` — this is an inline code comment, not an explicit documentation of the default value

findings.description: Hints for section s3 (入力データの復元) are missing `リクエストパラメータ`, which is the third item in the scope search order and a distinct search target that writeタグ specifically excludes.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'Servlet APIのリクエストパラメータ' listed as item 3 in scope search order; 'writeタグは出力専用のため、リクエストパラメータを検索対象に含めない'

findings.description: Hints for section s2 (hiddenの復号処理) are missing `BASE64`, which appears as a named tamper-detection condition ('BASE64のデコードに失敗する').
findings.source_evidence: Source: '* BASE64のデコードに失敗する。' listed as one of the five tamper-detection conditions
